response.justification: While Bogdan brings exceptional technical depth (18+ years development, strong developer tools and infrastructure expertise), the resume shows no evidence of the required 2+ years of people management experience or formal team leadership. The role requires conducting one-on-ones, managing performance, and developing teams—capabilities that are not demonstrated in this resume. This candidate appears well-suited for a Principal/Staff Engineer role but lacks the foundational people leadership experience needed for a management position.
strengths: 18+ years of software development across web, mobile, backend, and infrastructure domains with demonstrated expertise in developer tools (test runners, testing libraries, CI/CD systems)
Strong testing and quality focus: created testing libraries (Fluent-Asserts), built custom test runner (Trial), taught multiple Selenium/testing courses, and advocates for TDD and code craftsmanship
Significant infrastructure and DevOps experience: GitLab administration, CI/CD pipeline setup, Docker/Kubernetes deployment, AWS CDK, and high-performance system optimization
concerns: No evidence of people management experience: resume contains no mention of direct reports, team leadership, hiring, or performance management—a mandatory requirement for a management role

Limited evidence of formal technical leadership or organizational impact: Staff titles are listed but actual scope of influence (mentoring, architecture decisions affecting teams) is unclear and understated
No organizational change leadership: no examples of leading process improvements, culture initiatives, or strategic organizational transformation

key_factors.factor: Strong technical depth and developer tools expertise
